note: standard electric bill with amount, due date, and two explicit actions

message.subject: Your June statement is ready
message.body_text: Your Pacific Light & Power statement is ready. Amount due: $142.67. Payment due date: 06/24/2026. Pay online or schedule a payment from your checking account.

note: disconnection warning: shutoff date and payment deadline are both true deadlines

message.subject: FINAL NOTICE before service disconnection
message.body_text: FINAL NOTICE: Your account is past due in the amount of $287.14. To avoid disconnection of service on July 8, 2026, pay the full balance before July 7, 2026.

note: past original due date should not be a deadline (high-confidence FP trap); new deadline and late penalty are real

message.subject: Water bill past due
message.body_text: Your City of Fairmont water bill of $94.30 was due on 06/15/2026 and remains unpaid. Submit payment by 06/29/2026 to avoid a $15 late penalty.

note: autopay reminder: upcoming draft date and amount are real; sign-in is an auxiliary explicit action

message.subject: Upcoming autopay
message.body_text: Reminder: your natural gas autopay of $61.20 will process on 06/27/2026. No action is needed. To change your payment method, sign in to your account.

note: price increase notice: promo end date and both amounts are user-relevant

message.subject: Changes to your monthly price
message.body_text: Starting with your August bill, the monthly price of your Fiber 500 plan will increase from $55 to $65. Your promotional rate ends July 31, 2026. To explore other plans, visit our website or call 555-0199.

note: wireless bill with abbreviated month date format

message.subject: Your wireless statement
message.body_text: Your wireless statement for June is now available. Total due: $88.52 by Jul 3, 2026. View your bill in the app or pay now to stay on track.

note: dispute window: core verb (dispute) is outside the action lexicon, gerunds defeat call/submit

message.subject: Adjustment applied to your account
message.body_text: We have applied a $42.00 adjustment to your account. If you believe this charge is incorrect, you must dispute it before August 1, 2026 by calling customer service or submitting a dispute form online.

note: clean negative: usage warning with no date, amount, or listed verb

message.subject: You have used 90% of your data
message.body_text: Heads up: your data usage has reached 90% of your monthly allowance. Overage charges may apply once you exceed your limit. Manage your usage in the app.

note: inspection appointment with single-digit slash date; reschedule does not match the schedule verb

message.subject: Annual gas safety inspection
message.body_text: Annual gas safety inspection: a technician is assigned to your address on 7/9/2026 from 8 AM to 12 PM. An adult must be present. To reschedule, call 555-0123.

note: budget billing change: effective date and both amounts are user-relevant, no explicit action

message.subject: Your budget billing amount is changing
message.body_text: Your budget billing plan has been reviewed. Beginning 09/01/2026, your monthly budget amount changes from $95 to $110 based on your trailing 12-month usage.

note: in-category negative: credit applied to account, no obligation

message.subject: A credit was applied to your account
message.body_text: Good news: a credit of $33.80 from your solar true-up has been applied to your account. Your next statement will reflect this credit. No payment is required at this time.

note: lien warning: high-stakes amount and deadline; contact is outside the action lexicon

message.subject: URGENT: unpaid water service charges
message.body_text: URGENT: unpaid water service charges of $412.55 may result in a municipal lien on the property. Pay in full or contact us to arrange a payment plan no later than June 30, 2026.

note: informational annual settlement: past period end date is not a deadline

message.subject: Your annual net metering settlement
message.body_text: Your annual net metering settlement for the period ending May 31, 2026 generated a surplus of 412 kWh. The surplus has been credited at the standard rate. This is an informational notice.

message.subject: Trash and recycling service fee
message.body_text: Your trash and recycling service fee of $28 is due 6/15/26. Pay with your city utilities account to keep service active.

note: abbreviated month with period; reply is outside the action lexicon

message.subject: Meter replacement appointment
message.body_text: Service appointment confirmed for Jun. 22, 2026, 1-3 PM window, to replace your electric meter. Reply RESCHEDULE if the window does not work.
